description: GROUP BY with multiple aggregate functions: COUNT, SUM, AVG

columns.name: total
columns.note: SUM return type is nullable per PostgreSQL catalog even within GROUP BY

columns.name: avg_amount
columns.note: AVG return type is nullable per PostgreSQL catalog

name: group_by_multiple_aggregates
query_sql:
-- @name MultiAggByDepartment
-- @returns :many
SELECT department, COUNT(*) AS cnt, SUM(amount) AS total, AVG(amount) AS avg_amount FROM sales GROUP BY department
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE sales (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, employee_id INTEGER NOT NULL, department TEXT NOT NULL, amount INTEGER NOT NULL, sale_date DATE NOT NULL);
